content.text: Now reply to each review comment.

input.command: gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/72/comments/3262971673/replies -f body='Done — extracted `platformVersion` and `buildToolsVersion` into local `let` bindings so the SDK composition and the `aapt2` path stay in sync.'
gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/72/comments/3262971675/replies -f body='Done — `GRADLE_OPTS` now interpolates `${buildToolsVersion}` instead of the hardcoded `34.0.0`.'

content.text: Both review comments addressed. The `flake.nix` Android dev shell now uses `platformVersion` and `buildToolsVersion` `let` bindings, so the SDK composition and the `aapt2` path in `GRADLE_OPTS` stay in sync. `nix flake check` passes; commit `1019b6e` pushed; replies posted on both comments.

result: Both review comments addressed. The `flake.nix` Android dev shell now uses `platformVersion` and `buildToolsVersion` `let` bindings, so the SDK composition and the `aapt2` path in `GRADLE_OPTS` stay in sync. `nix flake check` passes; commit `1019b6e` pushed; replies posted on both comments.
